privileged_info_summary: The mixed_column_layout_flyer task creates a real estate Open House flyer using LibreOffice Writer with synthetic data. The setup script generates a draft document (property_draft.docx) containing title text 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY', address, property description, and 6 features to be formatted. A synthetic image (1024x768 pixels, gradient background with text, created by ImageMagick) is placed at the specified path. The agent must format the title to >=24pt bold and centered, insert and resize the image to fill page width (~6-7 inches), format description and features into a two-column section, convert features to bullets, and save as open_house_flyer.odt. Verifier checks file existence, ODT structure (sections with >=2 columns, presence of images), title text detection, and uses VLM for visual layout verification. All metadata claims match the actual task implementation and setup scripts.
